findings.title: No explicit color-scheme/dark-mode signal observed
findings.evidence: Probe reported computed root colorScheme='normal'; dark-mode screenshots were not separately captured in pilot.

principles.summary: No interaction-specific issue found; keyboard/focus journeys need scale-run probes.
Primary navigation/search was present in homepage snapshot; menu/search flow not exercised.
No issue found in homepage pilot evidence.

findings.title: Mobile viewport has horizontal overflow
findings.evidence: layout mobile reported horizontalOverflowPx=611 and viewport meta=None.

principles.summary: Search/shop task is available but mobile baseline is compromised by desktop-width layout

findings.title: Search/shop task is available but mobile baseline is compromised by desktop-width layout
findings.evidence: Homepage presents search and shopping navigation, but mobile layout uses ~1000px layout viewport and 611px overflow.

findings.title: axe found 11 violation groups
findings.evidence: axe violations: aria-allowed-attr(critical,1 nodes), aria-valid-attr-value(critical,1 nodes), heading-order(moderate,1 nodes), image-redundant-alt(minor,73 nodes), label-title-only(serious,1 nodes), landmark-banner-is-top-level(moderate,1 nodes), landmark-no-duplicate-banner(moderate,1 nodes), landmark-unique(moderate,1 nodes)

principles.summary: Lighthouse best-practices score 0.50; failed audits include first-contentful-paint, largest-contentful-paint, errors-in-console, image-aspect-ratio, deprecations.

findings.title: Low non-JS discoverability (1%)
findings.evidence: discoverability found coveragePct=1%, isJsShell=True, raw status=202.

findings.title: Large third-party/network surface
findings.evidence: HAR recorded 319 requests; third-party count=311, third-party bytes=4239436. Script hosts include m.media-amazon.com.

principles.summary: Homepage/content-site pilot did not establish app-like offline/installable intent.
html lang='en-us'; locale/deeper i18n flows not tested.
Identity/commercial or editorial intent is clear in homepage pilot; consent/dark-pattern flows were not exercised.
Heavy transfer on initial load (4.4 MB)

findings.title: Heavy transfer on initial load (4.4 MB)
findings.evidence: HAR summary recorded 319 requests and 4445232 transferred bytes.

findings.title: Low non-JS discoverability (1%)
findings.evidence: discoverability found coveragePct=1%, isJsShell=True, raw status=202.

principles.summary: Single-load heap snapshot captured (13988329 bytes self size); no repeated interaction leak test in pilot.

verdict: Homepage pilot: 10 principles with issues; top concerns are high be-fast-and-stable: LCP above good threshold (18.4s); high adapt-to-the-form-factor: Mobile viewport has horizontal overflow; high be-discoverable: Low non-JS discoverability (1%).
_pilotCaveats: Pilot judgments are homepage-only and intended to validate schema/aggregation before scaling.
Axe was injected via Runtime.evaluate; BBC CSP blocked unsafe eval so BBC a11y is Lighthouse/probe-only in this pass.
Memory evidence is a single heap snapshot, not a repeated-interaction leak proof.
